description: As part of a procurement audit, an auditor conducts a walkthrough of the process with a procurement specialist.

nodes.task_description: Prepare a list of questions for the walkthrough covering vendor selection, purchase order creation, and invoice approval.

expected_outcome.value: A comprehensive list of interview questions is prepared.

nodes.task_description: During the walkthrough, ask the specialist to demonstrate how a new vendor is set up in the system.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor observes the process and identifies that no check is performed for duplicate vendors.

nodes.task_description: Request a sample of 25 new vendor setup forms for later testing.

expected_outcome.value: A formal data request is logged and sent to the auditee.
